channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress fly tipped in the park, 12th May
item.description:
Mattress fly tipped in park. The bin next to it also overflowing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 496, Hurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 12th May
item.description:
Rubbish outside house known to council and along Kingsley road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th May
item.description:
Stuff has been on pavement for a week at least

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tressillian Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street parking, 12th May
item.description:
I’m not sure but I think it is illegal to sign and sell your car on a highway,it’s been there several days now without moving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs need replacing, 12th May
item.description:
Both warning signs of a bend in the road outside numbers 15 and 51 Great Thrift need replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Buckley, 12th May
item.description:
Potty dumped here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dunster gardens, 12th May
item.description:
Suitcase dumped here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Gas canisters abandoned on road, 12th May
item.description:
Hello there There are several large gas cannisters which have been left on the road. We Iive next door to where they are abandoned but didn't want to put them in the bin in close they explode in a truck. Please could you remove. Many thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Buckley, 12th May
item.description:
Packagingdumped here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London

item.title: Dangerous growth for children, 12th May
item.description:
Bottom tree on odd numbers growth around tree dangerous to children. Been like this for months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Shuttle Close, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags dumped by tree on Benares Road, 12th May
item.description:
Multiple bags of rubbish dumped by tree on be wares road opposite 101

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bin bag, 12th May
item.description:
Someone has flytipped a bin bag which foxes have got into and there is now rubbish all over the road. Horrible and unhygienic.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General rubbish under the tree, 12th May
item.description:
Flying tipping as usual under the tree corner of Dalton Close and chandler way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Savannah Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly ripped furniture, 12th May
item.description:
Bed and other furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left over rubble form kerb stone repair many weeks ago, 12th May
item.description:
Seems like this rubble may have been forgotten about after kerb / paving stone repairs a number of weeks ago.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balgowan Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa ta junction of Bury Road and Whymark Avenue, 12th May
item.description:
Sofa at junction of Bury Road and Whymark Avenue near entrance to Westbeech Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Westbeech Road, Harringay, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Tuscan Rd, 12th May
item.description:
Several bags of household rubbish dumped on corner of Tuscan Road and Heavitree Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left on pavement, 12th May
item.description:
Bins, wheelbarrow and drawers left on pavement on the bend in bursdon close. Bins are left here permanently and should go back outside peoples houses. They obstruct the pavement for pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Bursdon Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
